message:
fix(parser): constant-fold -Float to Integer for i64::MIN literal, fix test determinism

Parser now recognizes that -9223372036854775808 (whose unsigned magnitude
overflows i64::MAX during lexing) should fold to Literal::Integer(i64::MIN)
instead of remaining as Negate(Float(9.22e18)) with precision loss. Guards
against folding -0.0 to Integer(0).

Also fixes several oracle test queries: adds secondary sort keys for
deterministic ORDER BY on ties, replaces known-unsupported JOIN-in-subquery
patterns with single-table equivalents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
